# harvester_virtualmachinetemplateversion (Data Source)



## Example Usage

```terraform
data "harvester_virtualmachinetemplateversion" "linux_server_v1" {
  name      = "linux-server-v1"
  namespace = "default"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `name` (String) A unique name
- `namespace` (String)

### Read-Only

- `cloudinit` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--cloudinit))
- `cpu` (Number)
- `cpu_model` (String) CPU model for the virtual machine
- `cpu_pinning` (Boolean)
- `description` (String) Any text you want that better describes this resource
- `disk` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--disk))
- `efi` (Boolean)
- `hostname` (String)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `image_id` (String) Image ID in the format namespace/name
- `input` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--input))
- `isolate_emulator_thread` (Boolean)
- `key_pair_ids` (List of String) Key pair IDs in the format namespace/name
- `labels` (Map of String)
- `machine_type` (String)
- `memory` (String)
- `message` (String)
- `network_interface` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--network_interface))
- `node_selector` (Map of String)
- `requests` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--requests))
- `reserved_memory` (String)
- `run_strategy` (String)
- `secure_boot` (Boolean)
- `ssh_keys` (List of String)
- `state` (String)
- `tags` (Map of String)
- `template_id` (String) Template ID in the format namespace/name
- `tpm` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tpm))
- `version` (Number)
